outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran war: US and Iran race to find crew member from downed F-15 — Iran retains half of missile launchers
outlets.summary: CNN live updates focusing on missing WSO, intelligence assessment that Iran retains ~50% of launchers despite 36 days of strikes.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Two US warplanes shot down, search ongoing in Iran for 1 missing crew member
outlets.summary: WaPo focuses on F-15E/A-10 losses and ongoing SAR. Includes Hegseth 'no air defenses' fact-check angle.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Live Updates: 1 pilot rescued after F-15E downed over Iran — B-52 bombers now flying over Iran
outlets.summary: Fox frames B-52 operations as sign of US air superiority. Emphasizes pilot rescue success. Coverage of Rubio 'finish line' comments.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: What B-52 bombers bring to the Iran fight and what it means for the war now
outlets.summary: Analysis of B-52 deployment signaling US air superiority achievement over parts of Iran.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Tehran downs 2 US warplanes; Israel bombs Lebanon bridges
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera liveblog covering aircraft losses, Lebanon bridge destruction, UNIFIL casualties, and Bab el-Mandeb threat.

outlets.name: France24
outlets.headline: UN Security Council delays vote on authorizing force to protect Hormuz
outlets.summary: France24 on UNSC Hormuz vote delay, Russia/China/France triple veto expected, Bahrain resolution watered down.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: We will keep hitting Iran in full coordination with Trump; Iran missiles hit Rosh HaAyin, Petah Tikva
outlets.summary: ToI liveblog: Netanyahu coordination claim, 15 missile impact sites, cluster munitions in residential areas.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Iranian Missiles Hit Central, Southern Israel — 15 Impact Sites, Negev Factory Fire
outlets.summary: Haaretz detailed reporting on overnight barrage — cluster munitions, industrial fire, minimal casualties despite 15 impact sites.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran maintains missile capability — Ghalibaf signals Bab el-Mandeb; IRGC repairs bunkers
outlets.summary: Iranian media frames bunker repair and continued missile capability as proof of resilience. Ghalibaf Bab el-Mandeb post amplified.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian marks Islamic Republic anniversary — 'steadfast determination to defend sovereignty'
outlets.summary: PressTV covers Islamic Republic anniversary amid war, Pezeshkian's defiance, and continued missile operations against Israel.
